parameters.name: vhys
parameters.override_behavior: sets total differential hysteresis width centered at zero

modeling_constraints: Update retained decision state only at initialization and differential threshold crossings.
Drive complementary smoothed voltage contributions outside event blocks.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: OUTP initializes high only when the initial differential exceeds positive vhys over two; otherwise OUTP initializes low and OUTN high.
The low OUTP state switches high only on a rising differential crossing of positive vhys over two.
The high OUTP state switches low only on a falling differential crossing of negative vhys over two.
The previous decision is retained while the differential remains inside the hysteresis band.
OUTP and OUTN remain complementary and use the local VDD and VSS rail levels after smoothing.

title: Hysteresis Comparator
